questions.question: Which SPI signal is generated by the master to synchronize transfers?
questions.explanation: SCLK is the serial clock driven by the SPI master.

questions.question: What does CPOL configure in SPI?
questions.explanation: CPOL defines whether the clock idles low or high.

questions.question: Why does each SPI peripheral usually need a separate CS line?
options: To select exactly one target device
questions.explanation: Chip select activates the intended peripheral while others ignore the bus.
